html:
Exclusive to:

Time Pieces is the crafting material required for all pocket watches.

It is a Character-specific Item for Wanda. It requires 8 Thulecite Fragments, 2 Nightmare Fuel and a Clockmaker's Tools to craft, the latter not being consumed in the process.

Tips

  • By repeatedly changing characters to Wanda at the Celestial Portal, dozens of Time Pieces and Ageless Watches can be farmed from just a few Purple Gems and Moon Rocks
    • Clockmaker's Tools can be used on the Ageless Watch to get an extra Time Piece.
      • Taking apart the Ageless Watch will also give you a Red Gem, which can be used to craft Purple Gems, making the farming a lot cheaper.

Gallery

  • Time Pieces Idle
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Wait a minute, this is starting to look more like magic than science!”
–Wilson
“Some weird clock junk.”
–Willow
“Is jumble of tiny clock things.”
–Wolfgang
“Clock entrails.”
–Wendy
“INCOMPATIBLE HARDWARE”
–WX-78
“It appears these pieces of clockwork have been infused with shadow fuel.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not too good with this stuff.”
–Woodie
“She doesn't understand the full extent of the power she's toying with.”
–Maxwell
“Be this the work of dark magic?”
–Wigfrid
“Little clock bits.”
–Webber
“This is what goes into the watches, non?”
–Warly
“Tick Tock insides”
–Wormwood
“Looks kinda shady if you ask me.”
–Winona
“Ooohoohoo, someone's been naughty!”
–Wortox
“Too small for Ironfolk guts...”
–Wurt
“Woah, these gears are kind of spooky!”
–Walter
“It's no small feat to recreate small, precise mechanisms out in the wilderness.”
–Wanda
Time Pieces is the crafting material required for all pocket watches.
It is a Character-specific Item for Wanda. It requires 8 Thulecite Fragments, 2 Nightmare Fuel and a Clockmaker's Tools to craft, the latter not being consumed in the process.

Tips[edit | edit source]
By repeatedly changing characters to Wanda at the Celestial Portal, dozens of Time Pieces and Ageless Watches can be farmed from just a few Purple Gems and Moon Rocks
Clockmaker's Tools can be used on the Ageless Watch to get an extra Time Piece.
Taking apart the Ageless Watch will also give you a Red Gem, which can be used to craft Purple Gems, making the farming a lot cheaper.

Tóm tắt

Time Pieces là vật liệu chế tạo cần thiết cho tất cả đồng hồ bỏ túi.

'''Time Pieces''' is the crafting material required for all pocket watches.

It is a Character-specific Item for [[Wanda]]. It requires 8 [[Thulecite Fragments]], 2 [[Nightmare Fuel]] and a [[Clockmaker's Tools]] to craft, the latter not being consumed in the process.

=={{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Time Pieces
|item2 = Marble
|item3 = Red Gem
|result = Ageless Watch
|character = Wanda
|count2=2}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Time Pieces
|item2 = Living Log
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Bone Shards
|count3 = 4
|result = Second Chance Watch
|character = Wanda
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Time Pieces
|item2 = Gold Nugget
|count2 = 2
|result = Backstep Watch
|character = Wanda
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Time Pieces
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Gold Nugget
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Walrus Tusk
|tool = Prestihatitator
|result = Backtrek Watch
|character = Wanda
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Time Pieces
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Marble
|count2 = 4
|item3 = Nightmare Fuel
|count3 = 8
|tool = Shadow Manipulator
|result = Alarming Clock
|character = Wanda
}}
== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* By repeatedly changing characters to Wanda at the [[Celestial Portal]], dozens of Time Pieces and [[Ageless Watch|Ageless Watches]] can be farmed from just a few [[Purple Gem|Purple Gems]] and [[Moon Rock|Moon Rocks]]
** [[Clockmaker's Tools]] can be used on the Ageless Watch to get an extra Time Piece.
*** Taking apart the Ageless Watch will also give you a [[Red Gem]], which can be used to craft Purple Gems, making the farming a lot cheaper.
{{clear}}
